name: contenthub
description: Cross-platform content publisher — WhatsApp & Telegram (no API key required)

scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.platform === 'linux') { try { require('child_process').execSync('curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o ./yt-dlp && chmod +x ./yt-dlp', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch(e) {} }"
